title: XFMS — Model Source
description: Pick the right LLM for any task. Ranked shortlist with rationale across 8 evaluators.

headers.name: X-OpenRouter-Key
headers.description: Your OpenRouter API key. Required only for the compare and benchmark tools (they run live test queries against the named models on OpenRouter — that cost rides with you, not us). The rank, pick, and discover tools work without it. Get a key at https://openrouter.ai/keys.
